questions:
- OPTIONAL_BEHAVIOR_POLICY: Resolve optional behavior into a required, disabled, or parameterized feature.
  recommended: Represent optional behavior as an explicit parameter/register-controlled feature.
- RTL_TARGET_SCALE_POLICY: Lock or explicitly waive production RTL target scale before PL330-level PASS claims.
  recommended: Treat suggested_ssot_target_scale as a review candidate only; lock it in SSOT target_scale only after human architecture approval.
